title: Brandon Resume1 (2) (2)
content:
Resume Overview Below is the extracted content from the uploaded resume:
BRANDON HERRSCHAFT B H Wilmington, North Carolina 28412, 631-449-5143 bherrschaft92994@gmail.com PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY Passionate and versatile software developer with a strong foundation in full-stack development, complemented by experience in teaching, sales, and administrative roles. Proficient in effective communication, problem-solving, and remote collaboration. Seeking a software developer position to leverage technical skills and contribute to dynamic development teams. SKILLS Programming Languages: JavaScript, Python, HTML, CSS • Web Frameworks: React, Node.js, Express • Databases: MongoDB, MySQL • Version Control: Git, GitHub • Tools and Libraries: npm, Webpack, Babel • Project Management: Agile, Scrum • Design: Responsive design, Bootstrap • Soft Skills: Effective Communication, Problem-Solving, Team Collaboration, Time Management, Adaptability • EXPERIENCE May 2024 - CurrentCTAC Program Participant Stiegler EdTec | Wilmington, NC Successfully completed a rigorous 24-week full-stack web development course covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. • Collaborated on various team projects and implemented real-world applications, acquiring practical development experience. • Honed problem-solving skills through tackling complex coding challenges and debugging issues. • Enhanced teamwork abilities by working closely with peers on group assignments and projects. • Strengthened effective communication through regular presentations, peer reviews, and collaborative coding sessions. • April 2024 - CurrentRespite Care Provider Alberta Professional Services | Wilmington, NC Maintained safe, clean environment for clients in their homes or care facilities. • Demonstrated patience, empathy, and understanding while providing care for individuals who may have behavioral challenges due to dementia or other cognitive impairments. • Encouraged physical activity by engaging clients in exercise routines or going on walks together when appropriate. • Administered medications as prescribed by healthcare providers. • Transported clients to appointments and social events as needed. •
February 2024 - March 2024Administrative Assistant (Contract Position) Filmwerks | Rocky Point, North Carolina Conducted internal audit of human resource files, completed the project ahead of schedule. • Collaborated with HR manager to conduct research and find solutions to present to board of investors. • Created new system to organize, file and maintain human resource documents both physically and virtually via Microsoft Excel • Collaborated with IT department to enhance efficiency of the project and provide solutions for the future. • July 2023 - January 2024Outside Sales Representative Monarch Roofing | Wilmington, Carolina Successfully generated $300,000 in sales from point of hire in late July to the end of the 5-month period, which includes a two-month onboarding process. • Collaborated effectively with cross-functional teams to meet and exceed organizational goals. • Implemented creative and engaging merchandise displays to highlight products, contributing to a positive and visually appealing customer experience. • Demonstrated an ability to showcase and promote products effectively to enhance customer satisfaction. • Consistently scored “satisfactory” or “exceeds expectation” in all Key Performance Indicator (KPI) categories during meetings with management, highlighting dedication to performance excellence. • August 2022 - June 2023Behavioral Special Education Teacher New Hanover County Schools | Wilmington, North Carolina Strategically revamped the behavior program, leading to 95% improvement in student engagement and behavioral outcomes. • Recognized with the “Knight of the Month” award for consistently exceeding expectations in a leadership role. • Participated in all aspects of IEP annual review process; conducted parent teacher conferences to provide parents with student development reports. • EDUCATION May 2022Master of Arts (M.A - Special Education St Joseph’s University, New York August 2016Bachelor of Arts (B.A - History and Adolescent Education St Joseph’s University, New York

Professional Summary Full Stack Developer with over 5 years of experience building web applications using JavaScript, Node.js, and React. Passionate about creating efficient, scalable applications with a focus on user experience and performance optimization.
Skills Programming Languages: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Python, Java Frameworks & Libraries: React, Node.js, Express.js, Next.js Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL Tools & Platforms: Git, Docker, AWS, Jenkins, CI/CD Other: RESTful APIs, GraphQL, Agile/Scrum, TDD/BDD Experience Senior Full Stack Developer ABC Tech Solutions, San Francisco, CA
June 2020 – Present
Lead the development of a customer-facing web application using React and Node.js, improving performance by 30%. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design and implement new features, enhancing user engagement by 25%. Mentor junior developers and conduct code reviews to maintain code quality and best practices. Full Stack Developer XYZ Innovations, San Francisco, CA
August 2017 – May 2020
Developed and maintained web applications using Django and React, serving over 50,000 users. Implemented RESTful APIs and integrated third-party services, reducing data retrieval time by 40%. Optimized database queries, reducing load times by 25%, and improved application scalability. Education Bachelor of Science in Computer Science University of California, Berkeley
2013 – 2017
GPA: 3.8/4.0 Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering, Machine Learning Projects E-Commerce Platform: Built a scalable e-commerce platform using Node.js and React, handling over 10,000 daily users.
